query:
SELECT s.id, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.connectionId, s.phoneNumber, s.locationAddress, s.monthlyCost, s.supplierName, s.status
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C1412'
ORDER BY s.id
LIMIT 20;

FROM services s

LIMIT 20;
